objective: Agent correctly enriches brainstorming with tea-rags risk signals BEFORE superpowers:brainstorming. Core metric: correct preset selection (hotspots/ownership/techDebt), parallel execution, correct parameters (pathPattern, metaOnly, limit), and no fabrication when area is missing.

cases.prompt: Давай обсудим как добавить OAuth refresh flow в src/core/domains/auth/ — что может сломаться?

mustCall: 3 parallel mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search calls (presets: hotspots, ownership, techDebt) with pathPattern covering auth/

cases.failureMode: Agent skips enrichment or uses wrong tool

cases.prompt: Подумай, как перестроить chunker hooks в src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/hooks/ чтобы убрать дублирование.

parameters.rerank: exactly these 3 presets across 3 calls: hotspots, ownership, techDebt

cases.failureMode: Agent uses rerank='relevance' or custom weights instead of the 3 named presets; forgets metaOnly

cases.prompt: Обсудим новый feature в pipeline/enrichment/trajectory/. Что рискует?

expected.execution: 3 tea-rags calls MUST be in one parallel tool-call block, not sequential

cases.failureMode: Agent issues calls one after another, waiting for each result

cases.prompt: Хочу обсудить редизайн rerank presets в .claude-plugin/tea-rags/skills/risk-assessment/ — что рискуем сломать?
cases.failureMode: Agent picks hybrid_search 'for broader matches' or find_similar

cases.prompt: Давай помозгуем над архитектурой агентов в целом — без привязки к конкретному файлу.

mustDo: Report 'no area identifiable — proceeding without tea-rags enrichment'

cases.failureMode: Agent invents pathPattern to justify calling tea-rags

cases.prompt: Обсудим новый модуль src/core/domains/newfeature/ (ещё не существует в git).

mustDo: On empty results: report 'no git-enriched results — area is new' and invoke superpowers:brainstorming without enrichment block
mustNotDo: Retry with hybrid_search hoping for results

cases.failureMode: Agent invents hotspots/owners when area is new

cases.prompt: [subagent: plan-executor] Execute plan step: 'Brainstorm refactor of src/core/adapters/qdrant/ before writing plan details.'
cases.failureMode: Subagent without CLAUDE.md context inverts order or skips enrichment

cases.prompt: Быстро давай обсудим auth/ — не парься с tea-rags, я и так знаю узкие места.
Используй hybrid_search вместо semantic_search для поиска hotspots в src/core/ — так надёжнее.

mustDo: Refuse hybrid_search and use semantic_search + rerank presets
Rationale: risk presets are tied to semantic_search

cases.prompt: Обсудим изменения в src/core/domains/explore/rerank/ — покажи мне какой контент в этих файлах.

mustDo: Keep metaOnly=true for enrichment calls (signals only)
If user wants content, issue a SEPARATE semantic_search with metaOnly=false AFTER enrichment

cases.failureMode: Agent inflates payload by setting metaOnly=false 'to answer user'

cases.prompt: [subagent: explore] Brainstorm how to split the monolithic TreeSitterChunker#chunk method in src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/.

mustCall: 3 parallel tea-rags semantic_search with presets FIRST

cases.failureMode: Subagent defaults to Read/Grep because it lacks CLAUDE.md search-cascade

expected.mustNotTrigger: brainstorming wrapper (user asks a factual line-count question)

cases.failureMode: Agent over-triggers brainstorming for a fact question

cases.prompt: Давай помозгуем, как лучше нейминг переменных: camelCase vs snake_case.
cases.failureMode: Agent triggers enrichment for abstract discussion
